text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur says she wants to go to an
underground race as we're making our way back
from a day out, so I decide to join her.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm outta here. And just so we're clear, that was
all the help I'm giving you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait for m—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just leave me alone, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put her in a bad mood last time we went out, so
I'm hoping I can make myself more useful today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to waste looking after you, so
just keep your trap shut if you're gonna insist on
hanging around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks dead serious, so I do as bidden and
keep quiet so as not to bother her. I figure she
likely just wants to collect data. We head to the
venue, where...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Look who we've got here. Come all the way out
here to collect data, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't see what business it is of yours.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Haha, no need to get riled up. It's just rare to see
someone from the academy here.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'd say you're in luck. There's some
decent talent in today's line—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't care.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I said I don't care. Most of the people here don't
have proper form, so I've got no use for their
data.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Collecting meaningless data is no different than
collecting trash. I'm not looking to waste my time
with anything so inefficient.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...So that's the kind of person you are, huh? You
can't recognize talent unless it's got an official
seal of approval on it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell'd you just say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the growing tension in the air, I interrupt.
Although Air Shakur is often misunderstood, she's
never been someone who looks down on others.
choice_data_list:
I think Shakur just came here for a different
reason today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And if either of you want to hear it, then pipe
down for a minute. The race is starting.

text_block_list.name: Runners
text_block_list.text:
RAAAAH!
HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This race must be a special one, because the
cheers at the venue are almost wild in their
intensity.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah. Yeah, that's good.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: All right. Here's the reason I came today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur does something with her computer,
and it begins to emit a sharp sound.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Is that... the sound of the crowd just now in the
background of the song?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The song, likely still incomplete, features a
sample she just recorded during the race.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought there was something missing with this
track, and then I thought of this place.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It needed a feeling of longing—something crude
but intense. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I see what you mean. Sure enough, it's not easy to
find that kind of pure passion in a more formal
environment.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I liked what I heard. Looks like
you've got at least one person looking forward to
hearing the finished track. Now, I'll take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, high and mighty to the end. Thanks for
wasting my time.
choice_data_list: Still, the song came out well!
Still, the song came out well!
You really didn't record any racing data?
You really didn't record any racing data?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, high and mighty to the end. Thanks for
wasting my time.
choice_data_list: Still, the song came out well!
Still, the song came out well!
You really didn't record any racing data?
You really didn't record any racing data?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Eh, it came out fine. It was something to do, at
least.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I did what I came to do, so I'm heading
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing she doesn't want to talk about it, but
today, I've learned how stoically she approaches
her music.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did. I just don't like people up in my
business.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be very efficient to come here just for
fun, now would it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Shakur outsmart Sirius Symboli once again
reminds me just how formidable she really is.
